S

setAttack(int) - Method in class characters.Character
Updates the attack value.
setAttackBonus(int) - Method in class items.offensiveEquipment.OffensiveEquipment
 
setHealing(int) - Method in class items.consumable.Consumable
Sets a new healing value for the consumable.
setLife(int) - Method in class characters.Character
Updates the life points.
setName(String) - Method in class characters.Character
Updates the character's name.
setPosition(int) - Method in class characters.Character
Updates the position on the board.
SmallHealthPotion - Class in items.consumable
Represents a small health potion.
SmallHealthPotion() - Constructor for class items.consumable.SmallHealthPotion
Creates a new SmallHealthPotion with a fixed healing value of 2.
Spell - Class in items.offensiveEquipment.spell
Represents a Spell as an offensive equipment.
Spell(int) - Constructor for class items.offensiveEquipment.spell.Spell
Creates a new Spell with the specified attack bonus.
start() - Method in class game.Game
Starts the main game loop.
Sword - Class in items.offensiveEquipment.weapon
Represents a Sword weapon.
Sword() - Constructor for class items.offensiveEquipment.weapon.Sword
Creates a new Sword with a default attack bonus of 5.
